## Example

Count the number of days in February for a timestamp using explicit units.

```esql
ROW dt = to_datetime("2024-02-15T00:00:00.000Z")
| EVAL days = DATE_UNIT_COUNT("day", "month", dt)
```

| dt:date | days:long |
| --- | --- |
| 2024-02-15T00:00:00.000Z | 29 |
